text.title: Requirements Documentation Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml or to the universal skip-this-methodology conclusion.

decision-tree.root-question: Initiative requires hierarchical BR → SH → SR documentation?

conclusion.verdict: Full BR/SH/SR pack with acceptance criteria + ≥2 source citations per record.
Use user-story format; this methodology is unnecessary.
Document existing layer; stub missing layers with explicit gap markers.
Every requirement record requires acceptance criteria + glossary links + source citation.

example.description: When the situation matches the leading branch, apply the referenced rule; otherwise traverse to the next condition until the default branch is reached.
